visa_types.name: Renewal of Lost or Damaged Passport
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Nepali citizenship certificate and two copies of it.
- A copy of passport.
- Computer print-out from the immigration office attesting the applicant’s entry into this country and a copy of it.
- Police report and a copy of it.
- Letter from the Sponsor/Employer
- The applicant should be present at the Embassy/ Consulate.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
- The Government of Nepal started accepting applications for machine readable passport (MRP) from December 19, 2010 and the first lot of such passports were issued a week later. It may be recalled that this is perfectly in line with the commitment made by the Government to start issuing MRPs by January 1, 2011.
- The Embassy of Nepal, Riyadh has started live enrollment system for making MRP since 31 January 2016. The applicant himself/herself should present in the Embassy/ Consulate for the live enrollment.
- For more information, visit the mission website:
http://nepalpassport.gov.np (http://nepalpassport.gov.np)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
- The Government of Nepal started accepting applications for machine readable passport (MRP) from December 19, 2010 and the first lot of such passports were issued a week later. It may be recalled that this is perfectly in line with the commitment made by the Government to start issuing MRPs by January 1, 2011.
- The Embassy of Nepal, Riyadh has started live enrollment system for making MRP since 31 January 2016. The applicant himself/herself should present in the Embassy/ Consulate for the live enrollment.
- For more information, visit the mission website:
http://nepalpassport.gov.np (http://nepalpassport.gov.np)

## Visa Fees
400 Saudi Riyals. 

## Documents Required
- Original Nepali citizenship certificate and two copies of it.
- A copy of passport.
- Computer print-out from the immigration office attesting the applicant’s entry into this country and a copy of it.
- Police report and a copy of it.
- Letter from the Sponsor/Employer
- The applicant should be present at the Embassy/ Consulate.

## Download Forms
Online Pre-enrollment Form (https://emrtds.nepalpassport.gov.np/)

visa_types.name: Passports for Infants
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Nepali Minor Identity Card and two copies of it.
- Original relationship verification certificate and two copies of it.
- A birth registration certificate (having parents’ name) of the child issued from the competent authority of the government of Nepal and two copies of it.
- The original citizenship certificates of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- The original passports of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- The original Iqama or ID of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- The original marriage certificate of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- Written application from the parents requesting the Embassy/ Consulate for the issuance of the passport to their child.
- The parents should be present at the Embassy/Consulate along with the child to submit the live enrollment application.

- For more information, visit the mission website:

- The Government of Nepal started accepting applications for machine readable passport (MRP) from December 19, 2010 and the first lot of such passports were issued a week later. It may be recalled that this is perfectly in line with the commitment made by the Government to start issuing MRPs by January 1, 2011.
- The Embassy of Nepal, Riyadh has started live enrollment system for making MRP since 31 January 2016. The applicant himself/herself should present in the Embassy/ Consulate for the live enrollment.
- For more information, visit the mission website:
http://nepalpassport.gov.np (http://nepalpassport.gov.np)

## Visa Fees
200 Saudi Riyals.

## Documents Required
- Original Nepali Minor Identity Card and two copies of it.
- Original relationship verification certificate and two copies of it.
- A birth registration certificate (having parents’ name) of the child issued from the competent authority of the government of Nepal and two copies of it.
- The original citizenship certificates of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- The original passports of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- The original Iqama or ID of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- The original marriage certificate of parents (Father and Mother) and two copies of them.
- Written application from the parents requesting the Embassy/ Consulate for the issuance of the passport to their child.
- The parents should be present at the Embassy/Consulate along with the child to submit the live enrollment application.

## Download Forms
Online Pre-enrollment Form (https://emrtds.nepalpassport.gov.np/)

visa_types.name: Renewal of Passport
visa_types.documents_required:
- Original Nepali citizenship certificate and copy of it.
- Current original Nepalese passport and one copy of it.
- The applicant should be present at the Embassy/ Consulate.
